    Thousands of Georgians rallied in Tbilisi on Independence Day, demanding a European future and protesting the government’s democratic backsliding.
  • NEWMore Than 50 Countries Condemn Russia’s Mass Attack on Ukraine at UN · 2026-05-27
    A global coalition of more than 50 countries backed Ukraine at the UN after Russia’s latest mass attack, condemning missile strikes, embassy threats and nuclear-capable weapons.
  • NEWUkraine Has 500 Targets Ready in Belarus if Lukashenko Joins War, ‘Magyar’ Says · 2026-05-27
    Ukraine says it has already marked 500 targets in Belarus if Lukashenko enters the war, as tensions rise over alleged drone attacks near the border.
